[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000000 1
1 000000000 a
2 110001010 4
3 100000100 2
4 000100010 2
5 100000000 1
6 000100000 1
7 011000000 2

01 10 011001000 3
12 21 100000100 2 match 3
23 32 100100000 2
34 43 100000000 1 match 5
45 54 000000000 a match 1
56 65 000000010 1
67 76 001000000 1 match 0
70 07 001000000 1 match 0

02 20 000000000 a match 1
13 31 110001010 4 match 2
24 42 100000100 2 match 3
35 53 000100010 2 match 4
46 64 100000000 1 match 5
57 75 000100000 1 match 6
60 06 011000000 2 match 7
71 17 001000000 1 match 0

03 30 010001000 2
14 41 100000100 2 match 3
25 52 000100000 1 match 6
36 63 110000010 3
47 74 000000000 a match 1
50 05 000000000 a match 1
61 16 111000010 4
72 27 000100000 1 match 6

04 40 000000000 a match 1
15 51 000000010 1
26 62 100000001 2
37 73 000100000 1 match 6
